  1. io.bloviate.file

Uses of Package
io.bloviate.file

Packages that use io.bloviate.file
Package
Description
io.bloviate.file
 
  • Classes in io.bloviate.file used by io.bloviate.file
    Class
    Description
    ColumnDefinition
    Defines a column for flat file generation.
    FileDefinition
    Abstract base class for defining file format specifications.
    FileGenerator
    Generates output files from a set of column definitions.
    FileType
    Enumeration of supported file types for data export.
    FlatFileGenerator
    Generator for creating flat files (CSV, TSV, pipe-delimited) with synthetic data.
    FlatFileGenerator.Builder
    Builds a FlatFileGenerator, defaulting to CSV output and 1000 rows with no columns.

Bloviate API Reference · bloviate.io
